purpose_context: This mission picks up the post-PR #972 P1 stabilization tranche for the Spec Kitty CLI: consistent task-board progress semantics, dependency environment drift evidence or guardrails, fresh local and SaaS-enabled workflow smokes, and explicit release evidence with #971 recorded as included or deferred.
purpose_tldr: Close the remaining high-confidence release-readiness gaps before stable 3.2.0.
